review_text: Had a great short stay on spacious grassed site. Well kept clean amenities and awesome camp kitchen. Management were very helpful, most accommodating. Office stocks a few lines if needing a top up on supplies too.

Lovely, welcoming, affordable, quiet overnight stay off the highway; on lush green lawned generously sized site with privacy hedging; very clean facilities with steaming hot shower; onsite coffee and hot treats (from 9am) to see us on our way in the morning; hotel across the street. We look forward to a longer stay another time. Highly recommend staying here.

This wonderful hidden gem is only 1.5 hours from Adelaide. They only have 1 cabin but its spacious and the price is very reasonable plus the friendly staff and quiet atmosphere makes it a perfect spot for a relaxing holiday.
Lovely little caravan park and the caretakers are wonderful friendly people. The toilet and showers were lovely and clean. We are definitely coming back for a quiet stay!!
Awesome stay away and so peaceful

What an amazing little park. Beautiful Grassy sites - didn't even put our mat out. Clean amenities, and awesome managers. Chris & Belinda were easy to deal with and happy to have a chat.
Originally booked for 2 nights but stayed 4!!!!
Best hot showers in town and super friendly staff! Highly recommend!

After trying to book in after 6pm with no luck in Ardrossan, the lady at Price was more than happy to help us out at short notice providing us with a great cabin for an even better price. Thankyou and highly recommend

Great place to relax.
Lovely staff and other campers.
Park very neat and tidy

Came up here 25th 26th April to spend some time with my Dad stayed for 2 days first night was good had a couple drinks with my dad then next morning the person that was staying next to us and his dog face looking wife told us off cause apparently we were making to much noise and carrying on and that our noise wasn't appreciated like really its a caravan park ... He didn't look like a nice person looked stuck up to be honest wouldn't be a person I would wanna be neighbours imagine if he had kids * makes noises * yoUr noIse is Not Appreciated 😂  but overall I would visit here again . 👍🏻
Days like today we need a pool here
Facilities were clean and perfectly managed, the staff is really supportive, Has a great park closeby to play games, Nice and quite place with great amenities.
Georgus place and surrounding areas great fishing hole like all of the York Peninsula 😀
Very friendly staff. Great showers and toilets, very clean

Stayed in cabin with my mum and young son. Park desk-manager Andy was extremely accommodating and helpful, definitely made us feel welcomed in such a little town. Enjoyed some quiet time relaxing and just hanging out. Friendly locals (most of them) Not sure if the Park owners have any idea what tourist, even what the locals would like, attracting more customers, make some $ and make some improvements to keep the Park alive and running smoothly. Someone could make this Park great, help out the whole town, the local pub, ect, BUT its clearly not the people making decisions for Price Caravan Pk at the moment.
